channel.title: Emails on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Emails on Aamu.app blog

item.title: Aamu.app Emails - feature overview
item.description:
Earlier we configured Emails, now it’s time to see how to use it. At the main page of Email we see all the familiar elements:

  1. Search

  2. Project picker

  3. Compose a new email (keyboard short c)

  4. Our email address (to make clear where we are, we could in some other project with a different email address)

  5. Tabs. You can add more. The Unknown tab is activated when there are new emails from people we don’t yet know

item.title: Setting up Helpdesk in Aamu.app - Part 1, emails
item.description:
This time, let’s setup Helpdesk.

We are going to use emails as the Helpdesk “route” here — people will contact us through the email.

For emails, we need a domain. We covered domain setup earlier in the Emails section here. So, go read that first and set up your email domain with those instructions.

After that we are going to set up the Helpdesk, which continues in Project settings.

Users

First, we are going to add some users to our Helpdesk project. Only those users will be able to access the Helpdesk project. Do it here:
